2276910.name: OliVR
2276910.description:
Step into a Greek Mythology Inspired Story Rich VR Rhythm Game designed with comfort and relaxation in mind, encounter new friends and fight godlike foes with VR rhythm action all while exploring a gorgeous digital landscape!

Features:

- Play through a linear story-rich experience
- instead of battling your opponents, make friends and swing to the beat!
- Dodge dangerous attacks to the beat
- A unique and interesting soundtrack
- A wide variety of characters to meet over time!

Credits:

Pablo Heckman - Lead Developer/Programmer, Musician

Bella Escalante - Creative Director, Musician

Atharv Mehrotra - Head of Marketing
2276910.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
